national_mail_in: see gold-domains buyers.ts — scored tier, available in all metros

buyers.name: AJPM (Affordable Jewelry & Precious Metals)
buyers.address: 304 SW Washington St, Portland, OR 97204 (plus Beaverton and AJPM East locations)
buyers.payout_claims: Publishes live buy/sell spreads on its homepage (e.g. gold buy $4,119.40 / sell $4,121.40 at research time); claims "nationally competitive buy - sell spreads"
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described on site.
buyers.evidence_notes: The strongest price-transparency in the metro: up-to-the-minute buy AND sell prices posted publicly, "Portland's most viewed precious metals trading website since 1996." Three metro locations, walk-in. Spread pricing is bullion-oriented; jewelry payout math not posted.

buyers.name: The Jewelry Buyer
buyers.payout_claims: No payout rate posted; free evaluation ("There is no charge")
buyers.testing_transparency: Tests items in front of the seller and sorts gold from gold-filled ("He tests it and makes two piles, one for gold and one for gold-filled") — equipment not named.
buyers.evidence_notes: Second-hand jewelry buyer (explicitly "not a pawn shop") "licensed by the City of Portland and the Portland Police Dept." FAQ is unusually candid. Founding-year statements differ across its pages (since 1972 vs started 1980); at current location since 2003. The "50–65% less than a regular jewelry store" line refers to its resale prices, not payouts.

buyers.name: Portland Gold Buyers, LLC
buyers.address: 534 SW 3rd Ave, Willamette Building, Suite 305, Portland, OR 97204
buyers.payout_claims: "We Pay More" / "Best Prices — You get more money" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: "Gold tested, weighted and appraised right in front of you" — in-front-of-you process stated, equipment not named.
buyers.evidence_notes: Office buyer in Portland's precious-metals/jewelry district (3rd & Alder); immediate payment, no minimum; "Preferably By Appointment (Walk-Ins Welcome)." No payout math, licensing, or insurance posted.

buyers.name: Portland Gold Exchange
buyers.payout_claims: "some of the most competitive rates in the industry" with "a unique pricing system that is both fair and transparent" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described; pricing considers "weight and purity" plus "prevailing market conditions."
buyers.evidence_notes: Family-owned Sellwood-Moreland buyer; BBB seal displayed; buys bullion, dental gold, flatware, jewelry, diamonds; walk-in plus a "secure mail-in" option. Transparency is claimed but no rate schedule or testing detail is published.

buyers.name: Beaverton Coin & Currency
buyers.payout_claims: "best price for your gold or rare coins" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described on site.
buyers.evidence_notes: Westside coin/gold shop with "over 25 years of experience"; buys gold from individuals and resells; payment by cash, check, or credit card (bullion excluded). Walk-in retail hours.

buyers.name: Tigard Pawn 4 More
buyers.address: 11940 SW Pacific Hwy, Suite A, Tigard, OR 97223
buyers.payout_claims: "one of the highest gold payouts" — no numbers posted; "We want you to shop around. You deserve the best price"
buyers.testing_transparency: "We will evaluate and measure the items"; page explains karat purity (10k/14k/18k/24k) but names no testing equipment.
buyers.evidence_notes: Family-owned pawnbroker with published Oregon license number (LICENSE #PB-0382) and a stated police-check policy ("ALL ITEMS GO THROUGH A POLICE BACKGROUND CHECK"); free no-pressure appraisals, walk-in.

buyers.name: Alder Gold Exchange
buyers.address: 121 SW Morrison St, Suite 127, Portland, OR 97204
buyers.testing_transparency: No testing method described on site.
buyers.evidence_notes: Downtown buyer/seller of gold, silver, platinum, and numismatic coins "inside Bank of America building"; own site is thin — no hours, rates, or process detail posted, and a third-party listing shows a different SE 49th Ave address, so location should be confirmed.
